results.Query: Add new node with name new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_99 type EK_PACKET_SWITCH, to ju1.a2.dom. Return a graph.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = graph_data.copy()
    new_node_name = 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_99'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, name=new_node_name, type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH'])
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.dom', new_node_name, type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': graph_json,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
